meaning: n.仲裁者,调解者,中间物adj.中间的,媒介的
examples: He acted as an intermediary between Copeland and the villagers.
First, Venice's intermediary functions in the Adriatic Sea, where it had dominated the business of shipping for other parties, were lost to direct trading.
She takes pride in her role as an intermediary between artist and art world.
If you book through a travel site, you have to work with them as an intermediary.
One of the biggest assumptions until recently is that all communications required a media intermediary.
